message:
Refactor batch commands to use Output trait for consistent output

- Add BatchKeyResult and BatchSummary types to output module
- Add batch_set_keys, batch_fill_keys, batch_clear_keys to Output trait
- Implement batch methods in RobotOutput with JSON formatting
- Implement batch methods in HumanOutput with styled terminal output
- Update cmd_set_keys, cmd_fill_keys, cmd_clear_keys to use Output trait
- Remove duplicated BatchKeyResult struct from main.rs

This completes bead bd-2ui5: Update all command functions to use Output trait.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
